description_long: This is a large, modern wardrobe with a modular, grid-like structure composed of multiple open compartments and shelves. The wardrobe features several hanging rods with various garments, as well as numerous horizontal shelves for folded clothes or storage boxes. The exterior appears to be constructed from a transparent or semi-transparent material, possibly glass or acrylic, with a metallic or plastic frame providing structural support. There are no visible doors, giving the wardrobe an open, accessible design. The base includes a few pull-out drawers or trays, likely for shoes or smaller items. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or upscale dressing rooms.
description: A large, open, modular wardrobe with transparent panels, multiple shelves, hanging rods, and pull-out drawers, designed in a modern style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of shelves, hanging rods with garments, and pull-out drawers at the base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the wardrobe and the thickness of the panels, with a single pull-out drawer visible.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view displaying the open compartments and hanging rods, similar to the main front but with different garment arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wardrobe's depth and another pull-out drawer, with less detail on the internal compartments.
